entries.source: Try first: a coffee tax raises sellers' cost. What should you expect before seeing the graph?
entries.value: Gwada da farko: harajin kofi yana kara kudin masu sayarwa. Me ya kamata ka sa ran gani kafin ka ga jadawalin?

entries.source: Try first: a value logs as undefined right after a fetch call. What is the most useful first check?
entries.value: Gwada da farko: darajar tana nuna kamar ba a bayyana ta ba bayan kiran fetch. Menene binciken farko mafi amfani?

entries.source: Try first: if sales grow 20% but margins shrink and inventory needs jump, what probably happens to free cash flow?
entries.value: Gwada da farko: idan tallace-tallace suka karu da 20% amma ribar ta ragu kuma bukatar kaya ta karu, me zai faru da kudin da ake samu kyauta?

entries.source: Try first: in food delivery, which force is most likely strengthened by customers comparing prices across apps?
entries.value: Gwada da farko: a harkar isar da abinci, wane karfi ne ya fi karfi ta hanyar kwastomomi da suke kwatanta farashi a manhajoji daban-daban?

entries.source: Try first: what is better evidence that you understand a new concept?
entries.value: Gwada da farko: menene kyakkyawar shaida cewa ka fahimci sabon ra'ayi?

entries.source: Try first: which sentence usually needs repair when evidence is present but the paragraph still feels unconvincing?
entries.value: Gwada da farko: wane jimloli ne yawanci ke bukatar gyara lokacin da akwai shaida amma sakin layi har yanzu yana jin kamar bai gamsar ba?

entries.source: Try this frame: "When ___ changes, ___ changes because ___."
entries.value: Gwada wannan tsarin: "Lokacin da ___ ya canza, ___ yana canzawa saboda ___."

entries.source: Yes. Evidence needs interpretation or the argument feels unfinished.
entries.value: Iya. Shaida tana buƙatar fassara ko kuma hujjar za ta zama kamar ba ta cika ba.

entries.source: Yes. You connected sales, margins, and working capital instead of treating one line as the whole model.
entries.value: Iya. Ka haɗa tallace-tallace, ribar kasuwanci, da babban jarin aiki maimakon ɗaukar layi ɗaya a matsayin dukan tsarin.

entries.source: You add ideas first so the buddy can build with you.
entries.value: Kana ƙara ra'ayoyi da farko don abokin aikin ya iya gina tare da kai.

entries.source: You can recognize the definition when it appears.
entries.value: Kuna iya gane ma'anar lokacin da ta bayyana.

entries.source: You can use it correctly in a new example.
entries.value: Kuna iya amfani da shi daidai a cikin wani sabon misali.
Kun kammala hanyar.

entries.source: You gave enough of the causal link to move forward.
entries.value: Kun bayar da isasshen bayani kan dalilin da ya sa abin ya faru don ci gaba.

entries.source: You have a starting map now. Let us rebuild the weak spots.
entries.value: Yanzu kuna da taswirar farawa. Bari mu sake gina wuraren da ba su da ƙarfi.

entries.source: You have evidence for this step. Use Continue to move ahead.
entries.value: Kuna da hujjoji don wannan matakin. Yi amfani da Ci gaba don ƙara gaba.

entries.source: You named a changed input and connected it to the result. That is the move we are training.

entries.value: Sanya suna na wani sanannen mutum ko wanda aka kirkira a labari kuma ka tattauna da shi a kan kowane batu. AI za ta yi amfani da salon maganarsa da ra'ayinsa na jama'a yayin da take tabbatar da cewa muhawarar ta kasance mai adalci.

entries.source: Who do you want to debate, and on what?
entries.value: Wanene kake son yin muhawara da shi, kuma a kan me?
Muhawara

entries.source: Practice argument by debating a public or fictional personality on a topic you choose.
entries.value: Yi atisayen muhawara ta hanyar tattaunawa da wani sanannen mutum ko wanda aka kirkira a labari a kan batun da ka zaba.

entries.source: Learners who want lively debate practice with memorable voices and fair challenge.
entries.value: Daliban da suke son yin atisayen muhawara mai rai tare da muryoyi masu tunawa da kuma kalubale na gaskiya.

entries.source: The debate uses public style and worldview without pretending to know private beliefs.
entries.value: Muhawarar tana amfani da salon magana da ra'ayin jama'a ba tare da yin ikirarin sanin sirrin imanin mutum ba.
Sanya batu
Zabi wani sanannen mutum
Yi atisayen mayar da martani

entries.source: Debate climate policy with Greta Thunberg
entries.value: Yi muhawara a kan manufofin yanayi tare da Greta Thunberg
Yi muhawara a kan buri tare da Steve Jobs
Yi muhawara a kan adalci tare da Batman
Yi muhawara a kan kowane batu

entries.source: Argue both sides and sharpen thinking
entries.value: Ka kare bangarorin biyu kuma ka kara kaifin tunani

entries.source: Pick any topic and go head-to-head in a real debate. Choose a side, get challenged, and learn to make better arguments.
entries.value: Zabi kowane batu kuma ka fafata a muhawarar gaskiya. Zabi bangare, fuskanci kalubale, kuma ka koyi yadda za ka gabatar da hujjoji masu karfi.
Menene batun muhawararka a yau?
Muhawara

entries.source: Debate any topic, get challenged, compare claims, and learn how to make stronger arguments.
entries.value: Yi muhawara a kan kowane batu, fuskanci kalubale, kwatanta hujjoji, kuma ka koyi yadda za ka samar da hujjoji masu karfi.

entries.source: Students, debaters, writers, and curious learners who want stronger reasoning.
entries.value: Dalibai, masu muhawara, marubuta, da masu son koyo wadanda suke son samun kyakkyawar fahimta.

entries.source: The coach pushes one strong counterargument at a time and tracks the claims that matter.
entries.value: Kocin yana ba da hujja daya mai karfi a kowane lokaci kuma yana bin diddigin hujjojin da suke da muhimmanci.
Zabi bangare
Amsa hujjojin adawa
Karfafa hujjoji marasa karfi
